steps.description: Pipeline steps executed in dependency order

pipeline_outputs.description: Named output aliases for cross-pipeline artifact references

skills.description: Declarative skill references required by this pipeline

max_step_visits.description: Graph-level maximum total step visits across all steps (default 50)

name.description: Unique pipeline name (used for workspace paths, CLI references)

description.description: Human-readable description of what this pipeline does

release.description: Whether this pipeline is ready for release use

category.description: Pipeline category for grouping in the UI

disabled.description: Disables the pipeline from being executed

skills.description: Skill configurations keyed by name (check, install, init commands)

tools.description: CLI tools that must be available on PATH

example.description: Example input for documentation and testing

label_filter.description: Label filter for GitHub issue sources

description.description: Description of the expected input format

type.description: Step type. Omit for persona steps (default). 'command' runs a shell script, 'conditional' routes based on outcome, 'gate' pauses for human approval, 'pipeline' invokes a sub-pipeline.

persona.description: Persona name from wave.yaml manifest. Required for persona steps, omitted for command/conditional/gate steps.

model.description: Override the adapter model for this step (e.g., 'claude-haiku-4-5' for cheap analysis). Overrides persona and adapter defaults.

adapter.description: Override the adapter for this step (e.g., 'codex', 'gemini'). Defaults to the persona's adapter.

thread.description: Thread group name. Steps sharing the same thread name share conversation history. Enables fix loops where the fixer sees what the implementer did.

fidelity.description: How much prior context a threaded step receives. 'full' = complete history, 'compact' = summary, 'fresh' = none (default).

script.description: Shell script to execute (for type: command steps). Supports template variables like {{ project.test_command }}.

edges.description: Conditional routing edges. Each edge targets another step, optionally gated by a condition. Creates loops when targeting earlier steps.

max_visits.description: Maximum times this step can execute in a graph loop before the pipeline fails. Safety limit for cycles.

pipeline.description: For type: pipeline steps — name of the sub-pipeline to invoke.

input.description: Input template for the sub-pipeline (supports template expressions referencing artifacts and context).

contexts.description: Ontology bounded context filter — when set, only these contexts are injected into the step's CLAUDE.md.

dependencies.description: Step IDs that must complete before this step runs

timeout_minutes.description: Per-step timeout in minutes. Overrides CLI --timeout and runtime.default_timeout_minutes.

max_concurrent_agents.description: Maximum concurrent sub-agents the persona may spawn. Values > 1 inject a concurrency hint into the system prompt. Capped at 10.

concurrency.description: Step-level concurrency limit for parallel matrix expansions.

output_artifacts.description: Files produced by this step for downstream consumption

outcomes.description: Structured outcomes to extract from step artifacts for the pipeline summary

optional.description: If true, step failure does not fail the pipeline

rework_only.description: If true, step only runs via rework trigger, not normal DAG scheduling

policy.description: Named retry policy preset. 'standard' = 3 attempts, 1s base, 2x exponential. 'aggressive' = 5 attempts, 200ms base. 'patient' = 3 attempts, 5s base, 3x exponential. Explicit fields override policy defaults.

max_attempts.description: Total number of attempts. Default 1 = no retry. Overrides policy default if set.

max_delay.description: Maximum delay cap across all backoff strategies (e.g., '30s', '90s'). Overrides policy default if set.

adapt_prompt.description: Inject prior failure context into retry prompt

on_failure.description: Action when all retry attempts are exhausted

rework_step.description: Step ID to execute when on_failure is 'rework'. Required when on_failure is 'rework'.

strategy.description: Memory strategy — defaults to 'fresh' (no chat history inheritance)

inject_artifacts.description: Artifacts from prior steps to inject into workspace

step.description: ID of the step that produced the artifact (mutually exclusive with pipeline)

as.description: Name to mount the artifact under artifacts/ directory

schema_path.description: Path to JSON schema file for input content validation

optional.description: If true, missing artifact doesn't fail the step

pipeline.description: Cross-pipeline artifact source — pipeline name (mutually exclusive with step)

root.description: Workspace root directory (e.g., './' for project root)

type.description: Workspace type: 'worktree' for git worktree isolation, empty for directory

branch.description: Branch name for worktree workspaces (supports {{ pipeline_id }} template)

base.description: Base branch for worktree creation (e.g., 'main'). Defaults to repository default branch.

source_path.description: Path to external prompt file (for type: prompt)

path.description: File path relative to workspace root (optional when source is stdout)

required.description: Whether this artifact must exist after step completion

source.description: Artifact source: 'file' (persona writes file) or 'stdout' (captured from process output)

contracts.description: Ordered list of contracts to validate (takes precedence over the singular contract field)

target_step.description: Target step for review failure routing

source.description: Path to the file to validate

schema_path.description: Path to the JSON Schema file

dir.description: Working directory: 'project_root', absolute path, or empty for workspace

must_pass.description: Whether validation failure blocks the pipeline

model.description: LLM model for judge evaluation (for type: llm_judge)

criteria.description: Evaluation criteria for LLM judge (for type: llm_judge)

threshold.description: Pass threshold for LLM judge evaluation (0.0-1.0, default 1.0)

persona.description: Reviewer persona name for agent_review contracts (must differ from step persona)

criteria_path.description: Path to review criteria markdown file (for type: agent_review)

context.description: Context sources provided to the reviewer agent (for type: agent_review)

token_budget.description: Max tokens for the review agent (0 = unlimited)

rework_step.description: Step ID to execute on review failure when on_failure is 'rework'

max_size.description: Maximum bytes for this context source (0 = use default)

items_source.description: Source of items for matrix expansion

item_id_key.description: JSON key in each item that provides the unique identifier (e.g., "number")

dependency_key.description: JSON key in each item containing dependency list of item IDs (e.g., "dependencies")

child_pipeline.description: Name of the child pipeline to invoke for each matrix item

input_template.description: Go template string for constructing child pipeline input from item fields

stacked.description: When true, matrix items are processed in dependency order rather than fully parallel

type.description: Outcome type, determines how it is displayed in the summary

extract_from.description: Path to JSON artifact relative to workspace (e.g., 'output/publish-result.json')

json_path.description: Dot-notation path to extract value from JSON (e.g., '.comment_url')

label.description: Human-readable label for display in the outcome summary

json_path_label.description: Dot-notation path to extract a label from JSON for array [*] items

init.description: Command to initialize the skill in the worktree after creation

check.description: Command to verify the skill is installed

commands_glob.description: Glob pattern for skill command files

target.description: Step ID to route to. Can target earlier steps to create loops.

condition.description: Condition expression (e.g., 'outcome=success', 'context.tests_pass=true'). If omitted, this is the fallback/default edge.

type.description: Gate type: 'approval' waits for human input, 'pr_merge' waits for PR merge, 'ci_pass' waits for CI, 'timer' waits for a duration

auto.description: Auto-approve the gate (for testing or CI environments)

message.description: Display message shown while the gate is waiting

tui_action.description: TUI action identifier for this gate

prompt.description: Prompt text displayed to the human reviewer

freeform.description: Allow freeform text input alongside choices

default.description: Default choice key used on timeout or --auto-approve

timeout.description: Duration to wait for human response (e.g., '1h', '30m')

pr_number.description: PR number to wait on (for type: pr_merge)

repo.description: 'owner/repo' slug for pr_merge / ci_pass gates. Detected from git remotes if empty.

branch.description: Branch name for ci_pass gate. Detected from git if empty.

interval.description: Poll interval for pr_merge / ci_pass gates (e.g., '30s'). Default 30s.

target.description: Step ID to route to when this choice is selected. '_fail' to abort.

inject.description: Parent artifact names to inject into the child pipeline

extract.description: Child artifact names to extract back to the parent pipeline

max_cycles.description: Maximum iterations for the child pipeline

timeout.description: Hard timeout for child pipeline execution (e.g., '1h')

stop_condition.description: Template expression for early termination of the child pipeline

over.description: Template expression resolving to a JSON array of items to iterate over

mode.description: Iteration mode: 'sequential' processes items one by one, 'parallel' runs concurrently

max_concurrent.description: Maximum parallel workers when mode is 'parallel'

on.description: Template expression to evaluate for branching

cases.description: Map of value to pipeline name. Use 'skip' as the pipeline name for a no-op branch.

max_iterations.description: Hard limit on the number of loop iterations

until.description: Template condition for early exit from the loop

from.description: Template expression for the source data to aggregate

into.description: Output file path for the aggregated result

strategy.description: Aggregation strategy: 'merge_arrays' combines JSON arrays, 'concat' concatenates text, 'reduce' applies a reduce function

key.description: JSON object key to extract before merging (merge_arrays only). When set, each element is expected to be an object and the value at this key (which must be an array) is extracted and merged.

artifact.description: Artifact name from the source step

field.description: Optional JSON field to extract from the artifact

artifact_summaries.description: Artifact names to summarize for the post-pipeline chat session

suggested_questions.description: Pipeline-specific opening questions for the chat session

focus_areas.description: Areas to highlight in the chat context

max_context_tokens.description: Token budget for injected context content (default 8000)

name.description: Hook name for identification in logs

event.description: Lifecycle event that triggers this hook

command.description: Shell command to execute (for type: command)

model.description: LLM model to use (for type: llm_judge)

matcher.description: Optional step ID matcher — hook only fires for matching steps

blocking.description: Whether hook failure blocks pipeline execution (default varies by event type)

fail_open.description: When true, hook failure is logged but does not fail the step/pipeline

timeout.description: Duration string for hook execution timeout (e.g., '30s', '2m')
